case_title: MARY NARANJO VS. PHOENIX ELECTRIC COMPANY ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NARANJO, MARY AS TO DEFENDANT PHOENIX ELECTRIC COMPANY DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-06-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-05-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-14-2017
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100021473) EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWE COSTS AND FEES: DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFF $20,600.00
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-18-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-06-2017 CONTINUED TO OCT-18-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
